description: Fire Financial Services provides business payment accounts and related services including bank transfers, debit cards, FX, and open banking payments. Its products let businesses automate payments, reconciliation, and account-based payment acceptance.
summary: fire.com exposes two documented HTTP APIs: the Fire Financial Services Business API for business-account operations and a dedicated Open Banking TPP API at dia-api.fire.com; both require authentication and no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found.

surfaces.name: Fire Dedicated Open Banking TPP API
